'''lahuzhu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:avetheropod|avetheropod]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-h-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:avetheropod|avetheropod]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| lahuzhu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:læhizhith|læhizhith]] || [[word:læhizhij|læhizhij]] || [[word:læhizhish|læhizhish]] || [[word:læhizhi|læhizhi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:lahuhuzhuth|lahuhuzhuth]] || [[word:lahuhuzhuj|lahuhuzhuj]] || [[word:lahuhuzhush|lahuhuzhush]] || [[word:lahuhuzhu|lahuhuzhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:lahuzhuth|lahuzhuth]] || [[word:lahuzhuj|lahuzhuj]] || [[word:lahuzhush|lahuzhush]] || [[word:lahuzhu|lahuzhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:lahufzhuth|lahufzhuth]] || [[word:lahufzhuj|lahufzhuj]] || [[word:lahufzhush|lahufzhush]] || [[word:lahufzhuf|lahufzhuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:lahuzhuthu|lahuzhuthu]] || [[word:lahuzhuju|lahuzhuju]] || [[word:lahuzhushu|lahuzhushu]] || [[word:lahuzhuku|lahuzhuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:lahuzhuth|lahuzhuth]] || [[word:lahuzhuj|lahuzhuj]] || [[word:lahuzhush|lahuzhush]] || [[word:lahuzhu|lahuzhu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:lahuzhuthul|lahuzhuthul]] || [[word:lahuzhujul|lahuzhujul]] || [[word:lahuzhushul|lahuzhushul]] || [[word:lahuzhukul|lahuzhukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:lahuzhuthuthu|lahuzhuthuthu]] || [[word:lahuzhujuju|lahuzhujuju]] || [[word:lahuzhushushu|lahuzhushushu]] || [[word:lahuzhuku|lahuzhuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:lahuzhuthun|lahuzhuthun]] || [[word:lahuzhujun|lahuzhujun]] || [[word:lahuzhushun|lahuzhushun]] || [[word:lahuzhukun|lahuzhukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:lahuzhuthuoro|lahuzhuthuoro]] || [[word:lahuzhujuoro|lahuzhujuoro]] || [[word:lahuzhushuoro|lahuzhushuoro]] || [[word:lahuzhukuoro|lahuzhukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d2c7592}}
